languages.text: "Лорд-капитан? Я не тунеядец... Я за-заступлю на смену! Смерть не повод не трудиться... Только с-с-сердце, верните его, молю!" {n}Обломанные ногти впиваются в грудной аугмент и тянут в жалкой попытке его оторвать. Юноша заходится всхлипами, качаясь из стороны в сторону.{/n}

"Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан? Я не тунеядец... Я за-заступлю на смену! Смерть не повод не трудиться... Только с-с-сердце, верните его, молю!" {n}Обломанные ногти впиваются в грудной аугмент и тянут в жалкой попытке его оторвать. Юноша заходится всхлипами, качаясь из стороны в сторону.{/n}

But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

"Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

"Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

languages.text: 「艦長様？怠け者ではありません…勤務します！死が怠惰の言い訳にはなりません…でも私の…心臓…取り返してください！」{n}若い男は胸の補強に爪を立て、悲痛な声で取り外そうとする。彼は泣き崩れ、左右に揺れ動く。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様？怠け者ではありません…勤務します！死が怠惰の言い訳にはなりません…でも私の…心臓…取り返してください！」{n}若い男は胸の補強に爪を立て、悲痛な声で取り外そうとする。彼は泣き崩れ、左右に揺れ動く。{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人？我不是偷懒……我会守完这班！死亡不是怠惰的借口……可我的心……还给我吧，求您了！”{n}年轻人用断裂的指甲抠着他胸口的植入物，试图将其扯出，却终是徒劳。终于，他啜泣着瘫倒在地，身体左右摇晃。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人？我不是偷懒……我会守完这班！死亡不是怠惰的借口……可我的心……还给我吧，求您了！”{n}年轻人用断裂的指甲抠着他胸口的植入物，试图将其扯出，却终是徒劳。终于，他啜泣着瘫倒在地，身体左右摇晃。{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ? Je ne suis pas un fainéant... Je vais faire mon travail ! La mort n'est pas une excuse pour tirer au flanc... Mais mon c-c-cœur... Rendez-le-moi, je vous en supplie ! » {n}Le jeune homme plante ses ongles cassés dans l'augmentation de sa poitrine et tente pitoyablement de l'arracher, puis il éclate en sanglots en se balançant d'un côté à l'autre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ? Je ne suis pas un fainéant... Je vais faire mon travail ! La mort n'est pas une excuse pour tirer au flanc... Mais mon c-c-cœur... Rendez-le-moi, je vous en supplie ! » {n}Le jeune homme plante ses ongles cassés dans l'augmentation de sa poitrine et tente pitoyablement de l'arracher, puis il éclate en sanglots en se balançant d'un côté à l'autre.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Lord Capitán? No soy ningún vago... ¡Cumpliré mi turno! La muerte no es excusa para la holgazanería... Pero mi c-c-corazón... ¡Devuélvamelo, se lo ruego!». {n}El joven clava sus uñas rotas en el aumento de su pecho en un lamentable intento de arrancárselo. Se echa a llorar, bamboleándose de lado a lado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Lord Capitán? No soy ningún vago... ¡Cumpliré mi turno! La muerte no es excusa para la holgazanería... Pero mi c-c-corazón... ¡Devuélvamelo, se lo ruego!». {n}El joven clava sus uñas rotas en el aumento de su pecho en un lamentable intento de arrancárselo. Se echa a llorar, bamboleándose de lado a lado.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan... Ben tembel değilim. Vardiyamı tamamlayacağım! Ölüm, tembellik için mazeret olamaz... Fakat kalbimmm... Yalvarırım onu geri verin!" {n}Genç adam, kırık tırnaklarını göğüs ogmentine geçiriyor ve onu sökmek için acınası bir girişimde bulunuyor. İki yana sallanarak ağlamaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan... Ben tembel değilim. Vardiyamı tamamlayacağım! Ölüm, tembellik için mazeret olamaz... Fakat kalbimmm... Yalvarırım onu geri verin!" {n}Genç adam, kırık tırnaklarını göğüs ogmentine geçiriyor ve onu sökmek için acınası bir girişimde bulunuyor. İki yana sallanarak ağlamaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain? Ich bin kein Faulenzer ... Ich werde meine Schicht antreten! Der Tod ist keine Entschuldigung für Untätigkeit ... Aber mein H-Herz ... gebt es mir zurück, ich flehe Euch an!" {n}Der junge Mann bohrt seine abgebrochenen Nägel in seine Brustaugmentation und versucht vergeblich, sie herauszureißen. Schließlich bricht er in Tränen aus und schwankt von Seite zu Seite.{/n}

But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}
